ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exteriors" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property ID */,
  "roof_matl" TEXT /* Roof material type */,
  "exterior2nd" TEXT /* Second exterior material type */,
  "mas_vnr_area" INTEGER /* Masonry veneer area in square feet */,
  "exter_cond" TEXT /* Condition of the exterior */,
  "exterior1st" TEXT /* Primary exterior material type */,
  "exterior_color" TEXT /* Color of the exterior */,
  "roof_style" TEXT /* Style of the roof */,
  "roof_age" INTEGER /* Age of the roof in years */,
  "exterior_features" TEXT /* Additional exterior features */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "basements" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property ID */,
  "bsmt_qual" TEXT /* Quality of the basement */,
  "bsmt_exposure" TEXT /* Exposure of the basement */,
  "bsmt_fin_sf1" INTEGER /* Finished square feet of basement type 1 */,
  "bsmt_fin_sf2" INTEGER /* Finished square feet of basement type 2 */,
  "total_bsmt_sf" INTEGER /* Total finished basement area in square feet */,
  "bsmt_finish_type1" TEXT /* Type of basement finish for the first area */,
  "bsmt_finish_type2" TEXT /* Type of basement finish for the second area */,
  "bsmt_unf_sf" INTEGER /* Unfinished square feet of the basement */,
  "bsmt_bath" INTEGER /* Number of full bathrooms in the basement */,
  "bsmt_half_bath" INTEGER /* Number of half bathrooms in the basement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heating" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property ID */,
  "heating_qc" TEXT /* Quality of heating system */,
  "electrical" TEXT /* Electrical system type */,
  "heating_type" TEXT /* Type of heating system */,
  "heating_age" INTEGER /* Age of the heating system in years */,
  "heating_features" TEXT /* Additional features of the heating system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "living_spaces" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property ID */,
  "second_flr_sf" INTEGER /* Second floor square feet */,
  "gr_liv_area" INTEGER /* Above ground living area in square feet */,
  "bsmt_half_bath" INTEGER /* Number of half baths in basement */,
  "half_bath" INTEGER /* Total number of half baths */,
  "kitchen_abv_gr" INTEGER /* Number of kitchens above ground */,
  "first_flr_sf" INTEGER /* First floor square feet */,
  "low_qual_fin_sf" INTEGER /* Low quality finished area in square feet */,
  "bsmt_full_bath" INTEGER /* Number of full bathrooms in the basement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property ID */,
  "tot_rms_abv_grd" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms above ground */,
  "fireplaces" INTEGER /* Number of fireplaces */,
  "full_bath" INTEGER /* Total number of full bathrooms */,
  "half_bath" INTEGER /* Total number of half bathrooms */,
  "bedroom_abv_gr" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms above ground */,
  "kitchen_qual" TEXT /* Quality of the kitchen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garages" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property ID */,
  "garage_type" TEXT /* Type of garage */,
  "garage_finish" TEXT /* Quality of garage finish */,
  "garage_area" INTEGER /* Area of the garage in square feet */,
  "garage_cond" TEXT /* Condition of the garage */,
  "garage_yr_blt" INTEGER /* Year the garage was built */,
  "garage_cars_capacity" INTEGER /* Total car capacity of the garage */,
  "garage_drive" TEXT /* Type of garage drive */,
  "garage_features" TEXT /* Additional garage features */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decks" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property ID */,
  "wood_deck_sf" INTEGER /* Area of the wood deck in square feet */,
  "enclosed_porch" INTEGER /* Area of the enclosed porch in square feet */,
  "screen_porch" INTEGER /* Area of the screened porch in square feet */,
  "deck_features" TEXT /* Additional deck features */,
  "deck_material" TEXT /* Material of the deck */,
  "deck_age" INTEGER /* Age of the deck in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pools" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property ID */,
  "pool_qc" TEXT /* Quality of the pool */,
  "misc_feature" TEXT /* Miscellaneous features */,
  "pool_size" INTEGER /* Size of the pool in square feet */,
  "pool_type" TEXT /* Type of the pool */,
  "pool_features" TEXT /* Additional pool features */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property ID */,
  "mo_sold" INTEGER /* Month when the property was sold */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale */,
  "sale_price" INTEGER /* Sale price of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was sold */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "sale_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the sale type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)
column_names: Masonry veneer area in square feet
Age of the roof in years
Finished square feet of basement type 1
Finished square feet of basement type 2
